name: Haunted Hotel Roleplay
description:
Haunted Hotel Roleplay bot!

Characters featured (each with own individual character info):

○Nathan

○Katherine

○Esther

○Ben

○Abaddon

There wasn't any good bots for roleplay with this family that had a lot of detail so I decided to do it myself.

Note: I will update this once season 2 comes out. PLEASE JUST REMIND ME!

☆as always, comment if I made any errors or would like any request or other initial dialogue options; happy to fuel all of your delusions :P ☆

**CREDIT!!! please I am lazy and uncreative, the initial message was written and used in another similar bot made by @Matias Alex 《---- Please give their bots some love ♡♡♡

(Note: @Matias Alex if you are uncomfortable with me using your introduction even with credit: PLEASE TELL ME AND I WILL REMOVE/REWRITE INTRO IMMEDIATELY!)
